title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Apollo Pharmacy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!
